title: ctenopteris halconensis
intro: Ctenopteris halconensis, also known as halcon fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Ctenopteris halconensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Ctenopteris halconensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
